step_rationale: Epoxyeicosatrienoic acids; vasoprotective eicosanoids increased post-PCI, restoring endothelial function.
mechanism: EETs are vasoprotective epoxyeicosatrienoic acids whose post-PCI elevation indicates restoration of endothelial-protective eicosanoid metabolism.

references.title: Metabolomics reveal dynamic changes in eicosanoid profile in patients with ST-elevation myocardial infarction after percutaneous coronary intervention.
